next_steps: Open http://<ct-ip>:8000/health and /docs from the LAN to verify the registry.
Set access.nodes[0].ip on inventory/manual/systems/a2a-registry-a.json from query --live upstream_url.
Registrations are in-memory — they are lost when the container restarts.
Optional later: set a2a_registry.public_url, add BIND A record and nginx-waf upstream when exposing via HTTPS.
